description: Letter from Nahray b. Nissim in Fustat to Farah b. Isma’il, Busir. Around 1053. Farah is in Busir, probably was sent there by Nahray, and purchases and packs the shipments there. The letter mentions details about shipping dinars for the purchase. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #256) VMR
description_he: מכתב מנהראי בן ניסים, פוסטאט, לפרח בן ישמעאל, בוסיר, כ-1053, על רכישת סחורות ומשלוח דינרים לרכישה
